title: Device V2 DB-derived sample export and UI import acceptance
releaseGate: Publish after Batch 001 completes and the user confirms sample size, clone-code strategy, credential-ref-only rule, and cleanup boundary.

stories.title: Read-only DB sample export for real Device V2 candidates
stories.scope: Use the approved read-only path to select 5 real Device V2 candidates, preferably 1 per device type, and write a redacted sample artifact for import preparation.
stories.nonGoals: Do not mutate DB records, do not export plaintext credentials, and do not start collection.
acceptance: Writes `sample-set.json` with 5 selected devices and redacted credential refs only.
Writes `sample-selection.md` explaining selection criteria and exclusions.
Confirms no plaintext password/token/community/private key appears in artifacts.
validation: No code validation required unless source files are changed.

stories.title: Generate DB-derived ingest Excel with cloned device codes
stories.scope: Consume `sample-set.json`, generate an import xlsx using `D2LA_<orig_code>` cloned codes and `labels.d2la_orig_code` source mapping, and write a mapping report for the UI import story.
stories.nonGoals: Do not upload to the UI, do not modify records, and do not include plaintext secrets.
acceptance: Writes a DB-derived xlsx artifact suitable for the ingest/import UI.
Writes `import-mapping.json` with original code to cloned code mapping and confirms `labels.d2la_orig_code` is present.
Records any unsupported template field before upload.
validation: npm run typecheck:d2 if frontend scripts/source are changed.

stories.title: Upload and validate DB-derived Excel through Device V2 ingest UI
stories.scope: Upload the generated xlsx through the Device V2 入库工作台 and validate rows without doing broad follow-up work. Treat upload/validate as an acceptance item, including any intentionally incomplete rows.
stories.nonGoals: Do not start store, do not perform cleanup, and do not debug backend beyond recording the exact blocker.
acceptance: Captures upload request/response and UI validation state.
If validation fails for intentionally incomplete rows, records row-level errors as expected validation evidence; if core cloned rows fail unexpectedly, stops.
validation: No code validation required unless files are changed.

stories.title: Apply DB-derived import and hand off to management list
stories.scope: Submit/apply only after upload/validate succeeds for intended rows, capture task/result rows, and verify management page handoff for cloned device codes.
stories.nonGoals: Do not start store and do not delete imported records.
acceptance: Management handoff shows the cloned code(s) or records a precise blocker.
No original real-device code is overwritten unless explicitly approved.
validation: No code validation required unless files are changed.

stories.title: Reconcile imported cloned records against source DB sample
stories.scope: Compare imported cloned records with the redacted source sample on key fields and write a compact reconciliation report for store phases.
stories.nonGoals: Do not edit records, do not start collection, and do not perform cleanup.
acceptance: Confirms cloned records preserve endpoint/protocol/credential-ref data needed for store readiness.
Classifies any mismatch as blocker, accepted difference, or follow-up.
validation: If backend code is touched, allowed tests are `go test ./app/device/v2/...` and `go test ./app/device/v2/ingest/...`.
If validation depends on real DB/external collection infrastructure and fails for environment reasons, classify as `environment-blocked`.

evidencePolicy.dryRunBeforeMutation: DB sample export and Excel generation are preparatory dry-run phases. UI upload/validate is separate from apply. Apply is not allowed until validation evidence is written.
evidencePolicy.secretRule: Artifacts may contain credential refs/roles/protocols/ports only; never plaintext passwords, tokens, community strings, or private keys.

stopConditions: sample selection lacks credential refs or reachable endpoints
template mapping would overwrite original device codes or omit required clone mapping
upload/validate fails unexpectedly for core cloned rows
apply is requested before validation evidence exists
management handoff cannot find imported cloned codes
